title: Specific Aims — New Faculty Development Seminar Slides (Kamangar)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-02-13 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Specific Aims' presented by Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Walks new faculty through the structure and rhetorical strategy of an NIH-style Specific Aims page. Distributed alongside two companion example PDFs: Specific Aims MSU Examples and Specific Aims UAB Examples. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/Mo1vBzrDR2TsNJAcC7STOq5XCprHLghA42-70fcNxsd_r6-9JFf4j-_pXBFFCDZg.4QI0R7LjB-kVh3Q9
